arts.ttl: ‘Possibly next week’ – Formal negotiations will begin for West Ham player, president travels to London
arts.sum: Guido Rodríguez has lost prominence at West Ham United after Graham Potter replaced Julen Lopetegui in January. The Argentina international has made four appearances under Potter and only once since the end of January. Last summer, the midfielder joined the Hammers on a free transfer and his future could be elsewhere next season. arts.ttl: “Clear reasons” | Angel Gomes to make Spurs move after rejecting West Ham
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are pushing to sign free agent Angel Gomes after rejecting a move to West Ham. One of Graham Potter’s priorities this summer is to sign a midfielder who can control a game. In Potter’s opinion, the ideal man for that job is Lille midfielder Angel Gomes, who is available on a free transfer.... arts.ttl: Player living in ‘hell’ at West Ham United – Form has ‘plummeted’, not helping Hammers form
arts.sum: Lucas Paqueta is living a ‘hell’ at West Ham United, with the team’s bad performances, his own poor form and the lingering case against him put forward by the FA all contributing to his misery. That’s according to Rafael Reis’ blog for UOL, which details Paqueta’s ‘hell’ at West Ham at this moment in time.
